svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="a02-seed-data-flow" name="seed-data-flow"> <mxGraphModel dx="-569" dy="-192" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" background="#fbfaf7" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="none"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="repo" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=6;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#d9ded5;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=4;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=10;" value="repository — the project pgmi deploys" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="290" width="250" x="30" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf1e7;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="seeds/roles.json
the catalog as data — natural keys, no order" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="210" x="50" y="116" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="migrations/001_catalog.sql" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="210" x="50" y="182" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="__test__/test_catalog_invariants.sql" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="210" x="50" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf1e7;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="deploy.sql
your orchestration, in SQL" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="210" x="50" y="298" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="params" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#5d665d;dashed=1;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;" value="params file — CI-generated, layered per environment (--params-file)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="250" x="30" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="txn" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=4;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#d9ded5;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=4;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=10;" value="inside PostgreSQL — one session · one transaction" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="560" width="700" x="360" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="views" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9f4e8;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="session views
pgmi_source_view
pgmi_parameter_view
every repo file — SQL or not — as a row" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="190" x="390" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="steps" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=8;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf1e7;strokeColor=#143d2b;verticalAlign=top;align=right;spacingRight=10;spacingTop=6;fontColor=#143d2b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="deploy.sql — every step is a query " vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="430" width="270" x="630" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="1 · validate the seed file
undeclared grants · duplicate keys → RAISE" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="230" x="650" y="106" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="2 · apply migrations" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="230" x="650" y="166" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="3 · load the graph — one statement
jsonb_to_recordset + RETURNING chain" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="230" x="650" y="226" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="4 · reconcile + drift report
soft-deprecate removed rows" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="230" x="650" y="286" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="5 · CALL pgmi_test()
catalog invariants" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="230" x="650" y="346" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="catalog" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;" value="catalog
role
permission
role_permission" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="108" width="110" x="930" y="196" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="commit" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="COMMIT — schema and seed land together" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="230" x="680" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rail" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fdf3e7;strokeColor=#b45309;dashed=1;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=11;" value="any failure → whole transaction rolls back
exit 13 · nothing committed" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="250" x="390" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_files" edge="1" parent="1" source="repo" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.35;entryX=0;entryY=0.4;" target="views" value="loads every file"> <mxGeometry relative="1" y="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_params" edge="1" parent="1" source="params" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.8;" target="views" value="current_setting('pgmi.*')"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.3" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_query" edge="1" parent="1" source="views" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.3;" target="steps" value="queried"> <mxGeometry relative="1" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#143d2b;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="s2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e23" edge="1" parent="1" source="s2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#143d2b;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="s3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e34" edge="1" parent="1" source="s3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#143d2b;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="s4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e45" edge="1" parent="1" source="s4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#143d2b;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="s5"> <mxGeometry style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="catalog"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=10;exitX=0.6;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="commit" value="tests pass"> <mxGeometry style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#b45309;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="rail"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" />
